acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_F01] Pass if the revised text anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:87, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:151 shows one explicit downstream effect from the door challenge that alters procedure or decision timing; fail if the obstruction remains a knock-and-retreat with no later consequence.

[chapter_15_F02] Pass if the revised material anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:37, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:45, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:119, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:123 lets a reader identify at least one dispossessed family's concrete circumstance (not just filing type) and shows one direct bodily/social consequence; fail if the passage still reads primarily as docket taxonomy.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised text anchored around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:87, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:151 shows one explicit downstream effect from the door challenge that alters procedure or decision timing; fail if the obstruction remains a knock-and-retreat with no later consequence.
findings.problem: The county-intervention beat is introduced as immediate external pressure, then dissipates without a causal consequence that changes Lena's options. This reads as a suspense feint rather than a structural turn.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the obstruction thread at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:87, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:151 so the county attempt to enter creates a concrete cost (time loss, forced chain step, written demand, witness conflict, or relocation decision) that directly shapes the later release timeline.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:37, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:45, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:119, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:123 lets a reader identify at least one dispossessed family's concrete circumstance (not just filing type) and shows one direct bodily/social consequence; fail if the passage still reads primarily as docket taxonomy.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the discovery sequence leans on bureaucratic categories (petitions, accelerations, transfers, witness lines) while the human cost of dispossession is mostly abstracted. The chapter names harm but often reports it in procedural shorthand at the exact point the narrative should render lived consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:37, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:45, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:119, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:123, replace part of the inventory summary with concrete victim-side specifics drawn from the same documents (named household traces, material losses, or coercive conditions) and keep Lena's immediate embodied reaction in-scene rather than only legal categorization.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
